name: Zucchini Parmesan Latkes
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the zucchini and potatoes, then toss with lemon juice to prevent browning.
2. Squeeze the grated vegetables through towels or a sieve to remove almost all moisture.
3. Add scallions, Parmesan cheese, garlic, 1/2 cup parsley, salt, pepper, sugar, flour, and eggs. Mix thoroughly.
4. Heat about 1/2 inch of peanut oil in a pan until hot. Cook thin pancakes (about silver dollar size), frying on high heat until golden brown and crispy.
5. When serving, sprinkle with additional salt and the remaining chopped parsley.
Yield: 24 pancakes
